Headline: Marketing & Corporate Affairs @ HBL | IBA’25 | Brands, Consumers & Campaigns (Optional but shows your interest for this and will make you visible in searches for these keywords)
You can keep your existing bio or choose one of these options as you feel like

Story Telling Style (My personal fav, you can bland and make it what works for you as well): I studied marketing because I was always curious about why certain ideas, brands, or campaigns stay with people while others don’t. Over time, that curiosity turned into hands-on experience across consumer research, campaign execution, and digital marketing through my work at L’Oréal, PSO, and now HBL. At HBL, I work on marketing initiatives across sports and lifestyle platforms, supporting campaign planning, influencer coordination, and digital execution focused on reaching younger audiences. Before this, at L’Oréal, I worked on a Gen Z consumer insights project for Maybelline New York, where research and conversations with students were translated into practical marketing recommendations and audience strategies. Across these experiences, I’ve enjoyed being close to both sides of marketing, understanding people and then helping bring ideas to life. I enjoy environments where ideas are discussed openly, tested quickly, and improved through feedback. I like working on things end to end, from understanding the consumer problem to helping execute the final output. As I continue to grow, I want to work on brands and campaigns where creativity, consumer understanding, and execution come together to create meaningful impact.

Option 2: I am a driven marketer who is focused on understanding consumers and building ideas that connect with people in meaningful ways. My experience across HBL and L’Oréal has allowed me to work on youth-focused campaigns, consumer insight projects, and digital marketing initiatives where strategy and execution come together. At HBL, I work on marketing initiatives across sports and lifestyle platforms, supporting campaign planning, influencer coordination, and digital execution aimed at strengthening brand relevance among younger audiences. Previously at L’Oréal, I led a Gen Z consumer insights project for Maybelline New York, translating research and behavioral patterns into actionable marketing recommendations and audience strategies. I enjoy working at the intersection of insights and execution, turning consumer understanding into campaigns, content, and brand experiences that feel relevant and culturally grounded. I am particularly interested in roles where brand building, creativity, and consumer thinking come together to drive long-term impact.

Update HBL Bullets on LinkedIn: → Contributed to campaigns including HBL PSL, Brand Refresh, HBL Lifestyle, and FIFA Visa Spend & Win, supporting campaign planning, influencer coordination, and digital execution across multiple consumer touchpoints. → Supported development and execution of promotional content, including 30+ BAU social media posts, coordinating with creative and media teams to align messaging and publishing timelines. → Managed end-to-end website content operations, handling 150+ updates and working cross-functionally to maintain accurate and timely communication across high-traffic pages. → Generated consumer and competitor insights through sentiment and audience analysis, supporting content direction and communication decisions for youth-focused campaigns. (If you want to bold like resume, hack is to use unicode text because linkedin doesnt allow bolding) → Contributed to campaigns including 𝗛𝗕𝗟𝗣𝗦𝗟, 𝗕𝗿𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗥𝗲𝗳𝗿𝗲𝘀𝗵, 𝗛𝗕𝗟 𝗟𝗶𝗳𝗲𝘀𝘁𝘆𝗹𝗲, and 𝗙𝗜𝗙𝗔 𝗩𝗶𝘀𝗮 𝗦𝗽𝗲𝗻𝗱 & 𝗪𝗶𝗻, supporting campaign planning, influencer coordination, and digital execution across multiple consumer touchpoints. → Supported development and execution of promotional content, including 𝟯𝟬+ 𝗕𝗔𝗨 𝗦𝗼𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹 𝗠𝗲𝗱𝗶𝗮 𝗽𝗼𝘀𝘁𝘀, coordinating with creative and media teams to align messaging and publishing timelines. → Managed end-to-end website content operations, handling 𝟭𝟱𝟬+ 𝗰𝗼𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗻𝘁 𝘂𝗽𝗱𝗮𝘁𝗲𝘀 and working cross-functionally to maintain accurate and timely communication across 𝗵𝗶𝗴𝗵-𝘁𝗿𝗮𝗳𝗳𝗶𝗰 𝗽𝗮𝗴𝗲𝘀. → Generated consumer and competitor insights through sentiment and audience analysis, supporting content direction and communication decisions for youth-focused campaigns.
Update your skills in HBL so your overall skills get updated (among many these can be the top skills): Brand Marketing Consumer Insights Marketing Strategy Campaing Management Influencer Marketing
Lastly make sure to do your convocation post so your linkedin starts getting traction (completely upto you to post and whenever) <This message was edited>

Still getting used to saying this: I’m officially an IBA graduate. 🎓 Walking into IBA four years ago, I knew I wanted to understand business, but I didn’t realize how much I would fall in love with marketing along the way. From endless case studies and group projects that tested every ounce of patience, to turning ideas into actual campaigns, this place pushed me to grow in ways I never expected. Interning at PSO’s marketing team last summer and completing my final year project with L’Oréal were the moments everything started to make sense. Since graduating, I joined the marketing team at HBL, and the last few months have been a blur in the best way. Getting to work on something as big as HBL PSL so early on has been exciting, and a reminder of why I enjoyed marketing in the first place. Thank you to my friends who kept me sane, professors who made me think bigger, and family who never let me give up. This degree is proof that hard work, a little panic, and a lot of belief actually pay off. Durriya BBA | IBA’25

As Ramadan is just around the corner, make sure to calculate your zakat: https://paktaxcalculator.pk/zakat-tax-calculator/ Ps. You might know it already but thought to share as 1st Ramadan is a good start to calculate. I missed last year so I thought I will share with you so you dont
It's either by silver or gold
By silver savings of 175,000 or above
Better to use the lower of
It doesn't apply on your assets
Eg you won't include your phone
thats reminds me i think uspe b zakat kattna hai
And any other savings you have
In bank or any other form that you can readily convert
in hand aur savings ma farq phir kya hu
sab kuch in hand mein hi dal dun na bas
You're having it in savings account where you don't withdraw readily
In hand means in pocket or bank and can readily take out
i font hae anhthing like that expect meezan

i mean shud i keep it there or transfer to myelf
If you want to save your pkr from deflation
If you ever wanna cash out
They pay a little lower than market
And people are crazy to have them
So you can find on iba and lums group
People will pay 5-10 above the market
Because they use it for international transactions and all
And pkr mein it incurs lots of taxes
I'll advise to keep it there
But if u wanna cash out
Baqi there's one more thing I wanted to leave with you
And really important to find a zakat eligible person or you can do it to organizations like saylani etc too
You can do it in installments or lumpsum as well
May Allah accepts it and gives more barakah

I’ve been trying to stay friends, but I’ve realized it’s been more difficult for me than I expected no matter how much I try. Staying in touch brings back a lot of memories, and I’m still in the process of healing and finding my footing again. I see you in dreams everyday which feel so real. Dreams in which we are together, married, traveling and the other day you were sleeping and i was helping you sleep and I was wishing in my dream that please be real, dreams that make me the happiest in dream but the moment my eyes opened, it's just an empty feeling. Everything around me reminds of you, career fair day was such a day where I was flooded with memories and hardly stayed, going to shopping and seeing khaadi cafe the other day, even Afghanistan cricket team reminded of you😭 bizarre but it just reminded me of the match of aus vs afg and I remembered over zealously sharing with you. I know it's all me and I need to accept and process things because I'm just way too deeply emotionally connected and for that reason, I feel a distance will be helpful for both of us to protect ourselves and heal
im sorry ive been the one texting you

This isn’t easy to say, and it doesn’t come from any bitterness or bad feelings. Whatever is meant to happen, will eventually find it's way and happen. What we shared matters a lot to me, and I genuinely wish you nothing but peace and good things ahead and you'll be a part of my prayers. I hope you can understand that this space is something I need for myself at this point in my life and I'm sure you'd need that too to heal properly. I know that you've a supporting and loving circle around you now and I'm genuinely happy seeing your stories and seeing you enjoy and make memories. Incase, if you ever feel like needing me at a time where I'm the one you wanna rely on, you can just call me up directly. I'll keep you in my prayers and wishes🤍

You have been a real friend, a shoulder to lean on, someone I could share my good and bad news without thinking twice, someone I felt very open and comfortable This isn't a goodbye. May our paths cross again in a better way next time. May we work on ourselves and become better versions of who we have been. You'll always be a part of me, a part of my honest prayers and a part of my most cherished memories. Take care Durr, I'll always miss you. Giving us distance to heal while ensuring I keep making your life easier with that website will be my final act of love ❤️

Refreshing a brand like HBL was never going to be a small task. The real question was always, how do you actually make something this big happen? Over the past few months, I got to watch that question being answered in real time. I’ve had the chance to be part of HBL’s brand refresh at a time when the change is still unfolding, across platforms, branches, and everyday customer touchpoints. Watching something this big take shape in real time has been one of the most defining learning experiences for me so far. As a MT in the digital team, I worked on the execution side, helping roll out the new identity across digital platforms, social channels, and internal and external assets. It meant going through countless touchpoints and making sure the transition felt consistent everywhere the brand shows up. Being this close to the process also meant seeing how brand, communications, digital, and on-ground execution all come together. I learned from every part of it, from the thinking behind decisions to the effort it takes to bring alignment across such a large organisation. Grateful to the Brand team, especially Hassan Fawad Khan, Nemat Nizar Ali, and Anaiza Khan, for the guidance and for setting the direction for something this significant. And to my digital team, Moiz A. Juddi, Maharaib Irshad, and JJ, for trusting me with responsibility and letting me grow through the process. A big thank you as well to Ali Habib and the leadership for creating an environment where even trainees get to contribute meaningfully. The change is still in motion, and it’s exciting to see it continue to come alive across HBL. Here’s to keeping the momentum going.

I think you'd not be following his page tabhi (Robert Kiyosaki, author of rich dad poor dad). Here's what he posted ---- 🚨 3 WARS. 1 DAY. And your money is quietly being destroyed. Iran. Israel. USA — missiles hitting Tehran. US bases in Bahrain, UAE and Qatar under attack. RIGHT NOW. Pakistan vs Afghanistan — Pakistan just declared "OPEN WAR." Cross-border strikes. Kabul bombed. Hundreds dead. Russia vs Ukraine — still burning. No end in sight. 3 years and counting. THREE wars. Simultaneously. Today. February 28, 2026. And your financial advisor is telling you to "stay the course" with your mutual funds. Let that sink in. We can't do anything about these wars, but we can protect ourselves. That's why I want you to read this. Money will be printed again, more than ever before. Rich Dad taught me something the school system NEVER will: "When the world burns, real money is revealed." Not the paper in your wallet. Not the digits in your bank account. Not the stock numbers. GOLD. SILVER. Real assets. Things that have survived EVERY war, EVERY empire collapse, EVERY currency failure in the history of civilization. Think about it. World War I — paper currencies collapsed. Gold survived. World War II — entire economies wiped out. Gold survived. Every war since — governments printed money to pay for bombs. Gold survived. And silver? Even more powerful for the everyday person. Affordable. Real. Finite. Governments cannot print it into existence. Now we have THREE wars happening at once. - Three governments printing money. - Three military machines burning through billions by the hour. - Three reasons why the dollar gets weaker while gold and silver get stronger. This is not a coincidence. This is a pattern. The oldest pattern in financial history. The rich have known this for centuries. That's WHY they're rich. Every time there's a war, two groups emerge: Those who PANIC and hold paper — they lose. Those who hold REAL assets — they win. I'm not telling you to celebrate war. War is tragedy. Real people are dying today in Iran, in Afghanistan, in Ukraine, in Israel, in USA - real people. But I AM telling you this: The world does not stop turning. Bills do not stop coming. Inflation does not take a day off because missiles are flying. Three wars are happening RIGHT NOW. Three governments are about to print trillions to pay for them. That money has to come from somewhere. It's coming from your savings. Your salary. Your purchasing power. The question isn't whether this will affect your wallet. It already is. Gold. Silver. Real assets. The rich don't wait for permission to protect themselves. Neither should you.
